title: Count Different Palindromic Subsequences
description: Cho chuỗi S. Đếm số palindromic subsequence khác nhau (mod 10^9+7). Subsequence không cần liên tiếp.
approach: DP[l][r] = số palindrome subseq trong S[l..r]. Nếu S[l]==S[r]: dp[l][r]=dp[l+1][r-1]*2+2; else dp[l][r]=dp[l+1][r]+dp[l][r-1]-dp[l+1][r-1]. Trừ trùng khi S[l]==S[r].
memoryTip: Count pal subseq = interval DP merge/split; mod 1e9+7.

solutions.python:
class Solution:
    def countPalindromicSubsequences(self, S: str) -> int:
        MOD = 10**9 + 7
        n = len(S)
        dp = [[0]*n for _ in range(n)]
        for i in range(n): dp[i][i] = 1
        for length in range(2, n+1):
            for l in range(n-length+1):
                r = l + length - 1
                if S[l] == S[r]:
                    dp[l][r] = dp[l+1][r-1] * 2 + 2
                    i, j = l+1, r-1
                    while i <= j and S[i] != S[l]: i += 1
                    while i <= j and S[j] != S[l]: j -= 1
                    if i > j: dp[l][r] -= 1
                    elif i == j: dp[l][r] -= 1
                    else: dp[l][r] -= 2
                else:
                    dp[l][r] = dp[l+1][r] + dp[l][r-1] - dp[l+1][r-1]
                dp[l][r] %= MOD
        return dp[0][n-1]

analysis.correctness: Interval DP đếm distinct subseq palindrome; trừ duplicate khi ký tự đầu cuối trùng.
pitfalls: Quên trừ duplicate inner same char
